TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == alakaway ku idang a imelang(nu Amilika a kamu:Hypartension, high blood pressure) u talakaway ku idang caay kaadih ku i hekalay a wayway, nika sa anu matenes talakaw kya idang u ŚÜ†ÁčÄŚčēŤĄą a imelang, kahung a masatedep ku sinduw, mapilpil ku balucu', i lilisay mutiywngay a ulat maesut, nipiadih caay kakapah, mahaymaway a imelang nu buwa' atu mahedaway ku punuw namin a imelang u sakatalawan cuduh nu idang anu epunan sa, a malatusa anu miditeksa a melawan ku nipitiyuwng nu sindu tu heci, anu mapepec mucudu, anu mabuhat mucudu uyni ku aadihan u mahpecay a nicudu u satabakiyay a niditek anu mabuhatay a nicudu u saadidiway aniditek u yadahay a babalaki i pahanhan i kahepecan mucudu itida i 100~130śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ (duma a ngangan mmHg), anu kabuhatan nicuduh sa i 60-80 śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ. anu cudu nu idang matulin mulawit tu130/ 80 atu 140/90 śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ a kaysi talakaway nu cudu nu idang nu wawa han tu aadihan caay kalecad tu babalaki, anu muditek tu cudu nu idang sa, aw 24 tatukiyan ku laeday a muculilay a sapiditek tu cudu nu idang (duma ngngan ABPM) kina mahiniya a mayda nu aadihan tu misaydan muditak tu cudu nu idang(Áį°Á®ĪOBPM) a kiyadahan ku mieciyuw. (Áį°Á®ĪÁāļ mmHg), (Áį°Á®ĪÁāļ ABPM) OBPM)šĺÜŚĺóśļĖÁĘļŤ®ĪŚ§ö.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ar~…ĺakawaj ku idaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč(nu amir~…ĺika a kamu:ńßjpart…ônsion, ńßigńß br~…ĺood pr…ôssur…ô) u tar~…ĺakawaj ku idaŇč ¶aaj kaadińß ku i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a wajwaj, nika sa anu mat…ôn…ôs tar~…ĺakaw kja idaŇč u **** a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kańßuŇč a masat…ôd…ôp ku sinduw, mapir~…ĺpir~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, i r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj mutijwŇčaj a ur~…ĺat ma…ôsut, nipiadińß ¶aaj kakapańß, mańßajmawaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu buwa Ē~ ° atu mańß…ôdawaj ku punuw namin a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u sakatar~…ĺawan ¶uduńß nu idaŇč anu …ôpunan sa, a mar~…ĺatusa anu midit…ôksa a m…ôr~…ĺawan ku nipitijuwŇč nu sindu tu ńß…ô ¶i, anu map…ôp…ô ¶ mu ¶udu, anu mabuńßat mu ¶udu ujni ku aadińßan u mańßp…ô ¶aj a ni ¶udu u satabakijaj a nidit…ôk anu mabuńßataj a ni ¶udu u saadidiwaj anidit…ôk u jadańßaj a babar~…ĺaki i pańßanńßan i kańß…ôp…ô ¶an mu ¶udu itida i ***~******* (duma a ŇčaŇčan mmńßg), anu kabuńßatan ni ¶uduńß sa i **-** ****. anu ¶udu nu idaŇč matur~…ĺin mur~…ĺawit tu***/ ** atu ***/** **** a kajsi tar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶udu nu idaŇč nu wawa ńßan tu aadińßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu babar~…ĺaki, anu mudit…ôk tu ¶udu nu idaŇč sa, aw ** tatukijan ku r~…ĺa…ôdaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a sapidit…ôk tu ¶udu nu idaŇč (duma ŇčŇčan abpm) kina mańßinija a majda nu aadińßan tu misajdan muditak tu ¶udu nu idaŇč(**obpm) a kijadańßan ku mi…ô ¶ijuw. (*** mmńßg), (*** abpm) obpm)******.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == alakaway ku idang a imelang(nu Amilika a kamu:Hypartension, high blood pressure) u talakaway ku idang caay kaadih ku i hekalay a wayway, nika sa anu matenes talakaw kya idang u ŚÜ†ÁčÄŚčēŤĄą a imelang, kahung a masatedep ku sinduw, mapilpil ku balucu', i lilisay mutiywngay a ulat maesut, nipiadih caay kakapah, mahaymaway a imelang nu buwa' atu mahedaway ku punuw namin a imelang u sakatalawan cuduh nu idang anu epunan sa, a malatusa anu miditeksa a melawan ku nipitiyuwng nu sindu tu heci, anu mapepec mucudu, anu mabuhat mucudu uyni ku aadihan u mahpecay a nicudu u satabakiyay a niditek anu mabuhatay a nicudu u saadidiway aniditek u yadahay a babalaki i pahanhan i kahepecan mucudu itida i 100~130śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ (duma a ngangan mmHg), anu kabuhatan nicuduh sa i 60-80 śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ. anu cudu nu idang matulin mulawit tu130/ 80 atu 140/90 śĮęÁĪ≥śĪěśüĪ a kaysi talakaway nu cudu nu idang nu wawa han tu aadihan caay kalecad tu babalaki, anu muditek tu cudu nu idang sa, aw 24 tatukiyan ku laeday a muculilay a sapiditek tu cudu nu idang (duma ngngan ABPM) kina mahiniya a mayda nu aadihan tu misaydan muditak tu cudu nu idang(Áį°Á®ĪOBPM) a kiyadahan ku mieciyuw. (Áį°Á®ĪÁāļ mmHg), (Áį°Á®ĪÁāļ ABPM) OBPM)šĺÜŚĺóśļĖÁĘļŤ®ĪŚ§ö.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ar~…ĺakawaj ku idaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč(nu amir~…ĺika a kamu:ńßjpart…ônsion, ńßigńß br~…ĺood pr…ôssur…ô) u tar~…ĺakawaj ku idaŇč ¶aaj kaadińß ku i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a wajwaj, nika sa anu mat…ôn…ôs tar~…ĺakaw kja idaŇč u **** a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kańßuŇč a masat…ôd…ôp ku sinduw, mapir~…ĺpir~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, i r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj mutijwŇčaj a ur~…ĺat ma…ôsut, nipiadińß ¶aaj kakapańß, mańßajmawaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu buwa Ē~ ° atu mańß…ôdawaj ku punuw namin a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u sakatar~…ĺawan ¶uduńß nu idaŇč anu …ôpunan sa, a mar~…ĺatusa anu midit…ôksa a m…ôr~…ĺawan ku nipitijuwŇč nu sindu tu ńß…ô ¶i, anu map…ôp…ô ¶ mu ¶udu, anu mabuńßat mu ¶udu ujni ku aadińßan u mańßp…ô ¶aj a ni ¶udu u satabakijaj a nidit…ôk anu mabuńßataj a ni ¶udu u saadidiwaj anidit…ôk u jadańßaj a babar~…ĺaki i pańßanńßan i kańß…ôp…ô ¶an mu ¶udu itida i ***~******* (duma a ŇčaŇčan mmńßg), anu kabuńßatan ni ¶uduńß sa i **-** ****. anu ¶udu nu idaŇč matur~…ĺin mur~…ĺawit tu***/ ** atu ***/** **** a kajsi tar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶udu nu idaŇč nu wawa ńßan tu aadińßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu babar~…ĺaki, anu mudit…ôk tu ¶udu nu idaŇč sa, aw ** tatukijan ku r~…ĺa…ôdaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a sapidit…ôk tu ¶udu nu idaŇč (duma ŇčŇčan abpm) kina mańßinija a majda nu aadińßan tu misajdan muditak tu ¶udu nu idaŇč(**obpm) a kijadańßan ku mi…ô ¶ijuw. (*** mmńßg), (*** abpm) obpm)******.
